recommendations.title: At First Sight
recommendations.overview: A blind man has an operation to regain his sight at the urging of his girlfriend and must deal with the changes to his life.

recommendations.title: Guilty by Suspicion
recommendations.overview: Owing to his alleged involvement with communist parties, film director David Merrill is forbidden from working in Hollywood. He decides to fight for his rights and faces numerous challenges.

recommendations.title: Home of the Brave
recommendations.overview: The day after they get the word they'll go home in two weeks, a group of soldiers from Spokane are ambushed in an Iraqi city. Back stateside we follow four of them - a surgeon who saw too much, a teacher who's a single mom and who lost a hand in the

recommendations.title: The Net
recommendations.overview: Angela Bennett is a freelance computer systems analyst who tracks down software viruses. At night she hooks up to the internet and chats to others 'surfing the net'. While de-bugging a new high-tech game for a cyber friend, she comes across a top sec

recommendations.title: De-Lovely
recommendations.overview: From Paris to Venice to Broadway to Hollywood, the lives of Cole Porter and his wife, Linda Lee Thomas were never less than glamorous and wildly unconventional. And though Cole's thirst for life strained their marriage, Linda never stopped being his

recommendations.title: Paddleton
recommendations.overview: An unlikely friendship between two neighbors becomes an unexpectedly emotional journey when the younger man is diagnosed with terminal cancer.

recommendations.title: The Pursuit of Happyness
recommendations.overview: A struggling salesman takes custody of his son as he's poised to begin a life-changing professional career.

recommendations.title: Wit
recommendations.overview: A renowned professor is forced to reassess her life when she is diagnosed with terminal ovarian cancer.

recommendations.title: I Want to Eat Your Pancreas
recommendations.overview: After his classmate and crush is diagnosed with a pancreatic disease, an average high schooler sets out to make the most of her final days.

recommendations.title: The Fault in Our Stars
